Interface DRICrosstab

All Superinterfaces:
DRIComponent, DRIDimensionComponent, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
DRCrosstab
public interface DRICrosstab extends DRIDimensionComponent

DRICrosstab interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
